docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH. PLAINTIFF HOWARD JUNKER APPEARED. DEFENDANT KATIE BURNS DID NOT APPEAR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
